overall_clarity: The prompt defines an unambiguous 6-step reasoning chain (A-F) with tagged steps, strict JSON schema, tool separation via [TOOL_CALL] syntax, multi-turn state management, a worked Hour 10 example, mandatory energy conservation self-checks, and a complete fallback table for every tool failure. It is hallucination-resistant by forbidding invented data and anchoring all decisions to tool-returned values.
